channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The US Treasury Department Hacked by Chinese State-Sponsored Actor
item.description: The US Treasury Department was hacked by a Chinese state-sponsored actor through a third-party software service provider, according to a letter sent to Congress on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: How to use Gemini AI to make templates in Google Sheets
item.description: Need ideas or motivation to help you build a spreadsheet in Google Sheets? You can browse through the templates that are included in this office app and select one to customize. But a more intriguing option is to use the tool in Sheets called Help Me Organize.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI ready to hit its stride in schools in 2025
item.description: Experts predict that 2025 will be the year artificial intelligence (AI) truly gets off the ground in K-12 schools.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, The Hill

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Homeland Security helps write the book on how to acquire artificial intelligence
item.description: Few departments have more diverse procurement needs than Homeland Security. The agency operates on natural disasters, immigration activity and cybersecurity. The post Homeland Security helps write the book on how to acquire artificial intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: 12 AI predictions for 2025
item.description: Generative AI has seen faster and more widespread adoption than any other technology today, with many companies already seeing ROI and scaling up use cases into wide adoption.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Over 800,000 electric car owners and drivers may have had private info exposed online
item.description: Data from 800,000 Audi, SEAT, Skoda and Volkswagen cars was stored insecurely in an Amazon cloud folder.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 10 hot programming trends
item.description: Tides ebb and flow. Pendulums swing. Ideas come and go, especially in programming, where the technologies and techniques for creating software continuously evolve. Some programming languages, libraries, platforms, and tools become hot and irresistible.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Ocho razones por las que las transformaciones digitales aún fracasan
item.description: Se podría pensar que los líderes de TI ya tendrían dominado toda la operativa de transformación digital, dado que las organizaciones han estado implementando iniciativas durante varios años. Pero estarían equivocados.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: These glasses let you 'see' conversations in real time
item.description: When I heard about AI glasses that let you "see" what people are saying, I was skeptical. But after trying them on, I was proven wrong.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation

item.title: Tech Resolutions 2025 – 7 ways to survive January and upgrade your life with tech this year
item.description: Looking to upgrade your tech life in 2024? Here are 14 ways the TechRadar team is doing it –and how you can do the same.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: Meet the mad scientist of headphones, whose wild designs electrify Reddit
item.description: The standard shape for big, chunky headphones has long been a rainbow with Moon Pies at either end. No rule exists, however, forcing audio companies to keep making them that way. Philip Kaplan, the tech entrepreneur behind Tiny Letter and DistroKid, has been proving as much all year.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Musk writes op-ed backing far-right German political party
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk penned an op-ed further expressing support for the far-right German political party Alternative for Germany (AfD). In response, the paper’s commentary editor resigned in protest.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Got an Apple computer for Christmas? Here are 6 apps and games to try with that new Mac
item.description: So you woke up on Christmas morning to a new Mac. Perhaps it’s the miraculous M4 Mac mini, or maybe it’s the stunning M4 Pro MacBook Pro complete with the nano texture display.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Stuck behind a VPN wall? Let’s find a way around it
item.description: A virtual private network (VPN) allows computer and smartphone users to mask an IP and create a secure, encrypted connection between a device and the internet.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to delay TikTok ban so he can weigh in after he takes office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has asked the Supreme Court to pause the potential TikTok ban from going into effect until his administration can pursue a “political resolution” to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge
item.description: Gain insights into the future of ICAM and its role in secure, modern government operations. The post Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: DC air defense gets major upgrade
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and consulates if they think they are about to be detained by U.S. immigration officials.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4
